goal: Improve YouTube software lecture learning from Matt Pocock video
durable_behavior_seen: User wants to keep learning from the Matt Pocock YouTube lecture and make the YouTube skill better, so future video-learning turns should produce visual evidence, source confidence, learning drills, and ChefFlow adoption actions.
skill_gap_seen: youtube-watch lacked a dedicated software lecture mode, omninet lacked explicit YouTube/video routing, and there was no durable learning ledger for the lecture.

validation.skill_validator: PASS: node devtools/skill-validator.mjs omninet youtube-watch software-fundamentals skill-garden
validation.compliance: PASS: hard-stop scan for em dash, ts-nocheck directive, and forbidden public name in changed files
validation.other: Added a youtube software lecture learning golden prompt and a Matt Pocock video learning ledger under system/video-learning/.

commit: See enclosing git commit for this closeout report.
